description:
Responsum concerning orphans, describing a loan from orphans that is taken orally without an oath, and a statement that orphans who are in debt because of a deceased parent should not have anything taken from them until they reach a mature age. (Information partly from Goitein's index cards) EMS and VMR. 
The scribe is familiar from Avraham Maimuni's period. AA
description_he: תשובה הלכתית בנושא יתומים: הלוואה מיתומים נלקחת בעל-פה ללא שבועה; חייבים בשל הורה מנוח לא ייגבה מהם דבר עד שיגיעו לבגרות.
